BUILDING YOUR LAUNCH LIST
Module 4
Your Launch List: A list you build for and
during a launch
• Really this is just a segment or subset of your list
• It used to be different lists…
• Now it’s mostly segmented with tagging
• (Every email host is slightly different)
You probably already have an email list
• People opted in for your blog posts or newsletter
• They opted in for specific content on a specific
topic
• There’s (should be) an emailing frequency they’re
used to
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 6 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Why start a new list when you start your
launch?
• Your topic might not be exactly what they
originally opted in for
• You want to identify who’s really interested in the
topic you’re teaching
• The frequency of your emails will increase and
generally be more frequent than they’re used to
(especially during Open Cart)
The Launch List is a way of getting people’s
permission to send them this promotion -
it’s getting them to raise their hand…
The benefit of having a separate launch
list:
• Reduces unsubscribes and list fatigue when you
start sending the emails in your Open Cart email
sequence
• It creates a warm and engaged list
• The value of your Prelaunch Content pre-sells and
prepares your subscribers to be receptive to your
offer
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 6 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Is there ever a time you don’t need a
Launch List?
• When you’ve just built your Seed list (if you didn’t
already have one)
• The list is small and warm
• They JUST opted in for content that’s aligned
with your Seed Launch offer
• For a Quick Launch
• This is just a 3-5 emails over a period of 4-5
days to your list

Building Your Launch List…
Building Your Launch List
• You’ll typically still
email your entire list into
your Prelaunch Content,
let them know about
Open Cart, and about the
Cart closing… (5-6 emails)
• (You exclude anyone
that opts into your Launch
List)

While you’re building your Launch List
• You’ll want to hold off on mailing your regular list
anything else during the launch that’s not related
to your launch
• Hold any other promotional emails, etc.
• Your blog post should focus on your launch
content, behind the scenes, etc.

• Your launch list will get your

• This is typically 10-18+
